flags: shared_base_symbol_with:USDC.axl,USDC.axl-USDT.axl LP,USDC.axl-ASTROPEPE LP,USDC.axl-OPZA LP,USDC.axl-terra1ee4g63c3sus9hnyyp3p2u3tulzdv5ag68l55q8ej64y4qpwswvus5mtag2 LP,USDC.axl-wstETH LP,USDC.axl-LunaX LP,USDC.axl-dUST LP,USDC

route_to_terra: 1. Acquire USDC on Noble — either via Circle CCTP (from Ethereum, Polygon, Base, Avalanche, Solana, etc.) or directly on Noble
2. IBC send to Terra via Noble → Terra channel
warnings: Keplr search for 'USDC' shows DOZENS of variants across Ethereum, Polygon, Solana, Sei, Osmosis, etc. — only Noble-issued USDC routed via IBC is correct for Terra.
Do NOT use Polygon USDC, Solana USDC, or Ethereum-bridged USDC directly — those don't exist on Terra as the same address.
If unsure: use Skip.go and select 'send to Terra: USDC'. Skip.go will handle the bridging in one tx and select the correct path.
alternative_routes: Skip.go can handle the full bridge in one transaction — select destination Terra and asset USDC.

cosmos_chain_registry.name: Dragon
cosmos_chain_registry.description: Dragon Token is the native staking and governance token of Dungeon Chain, serving as the backbone of the ecosystem. Its primary roles include staking, where users stake Dragon Tokens to secure the network, enhance its functionality, and earn rewards in return; governance, granting token holders voting rights to influence key decisions such as game onboarding, protocol updates, and community-driven initiatives; and ecosystem growth, facilitating transactions, incentivizing developers, and promoting the creation of new interchain games. Dragon Token ensures a decentralized, fair, and community-driven ecosystem, fostering the evolution of blockchain-based gaming. It plays a crucial role in driving the growth of Dungeon Chain by empowering both developers and players to participate actively in the ecosystem's governance and success.

override._note: REMOVE THE LEADING UNDERSCORE TO ACTIVATE. This is an example showing how to override a specific token. Replace the key with the actual wBTC.atom address when known.
override.notes: Bridged via Skip.go / Eureka IBC route from Cosmos Hub. The .atom suffix is critical — wBTC.axl and wBTC.osmo exist on Terra too and are different tokens. Confirm address before any swap.
override.warning: Multiple wBTC variants exist on Terra. The Eris UI label '.atom' is the bridge identity. Do not confuse with wBTC.axl or wBTC.osmo.

_example_wBTCatom_disabled.notes: Bridged via Skip.go / Eureka IBC route from Cosmos Hub. The .atom suffix is critical — wBTC.axl and wBTC.osmo exist on Terra too and are different tokens. Confirm address before any swap.

_meta.description: Known protocols on Terra. Each protocol entry describes the protocol and lists associated contracts/tokens (which can also be auto-derived).

TLA.label: The Liquidity Alliance
TLA.description: The TLA (formerly Eris Amplifier Gauges) is the on-chain governance + LP staking system this dashboard tracks. aDAO is a council member.

Eris.label: Eris Protocol
Eris.description: Liquid staking + governance protocol. Operates the ve3 stack underlying TLA. LSTs include ampLUNA, arbLUNA, ampROAR, ampCAPA.

Astroport.label: Astroport
Astroport.description: Cross-chain DEX. Most active DEX on Terra. Hosts the majority of TLA pools as PCL (concentrated), XYK, and stable pools.

SkeletonSwap.label: Skeleton Swap
SkeletonSwap.description: Terra DEX. Hosts some TLA pools (typically xyk). Sometimes pools exist on BOTH Astroport AND SS for the same pair — variants can split liquidity.

DAODAO.label: DAODAO
DAODAO.description: DAO tooling. aDAO and allied DAOs use DAODAO contracts for governance + treasury management.

BackBoneLabs.label: BackBone Labs
BackBoneLabs.description: Protocol building bLUNA + BackBone Marketplace (BBL Marketplace) on Terra.

Solid.label: Solid Protocol
Solid.description: Decentralized stablecoin protocol on Terra. Issues SOLID. CAPA is governance/utility token.

PhoenixDirective.label: Phoenix Directive
PhoenixDirective.description: Active TLA participant. Regularly adds bribes to TLA pools.

Skip.label: Skip.go
Skip.description: Cross-chain transfer / routing. Used to bridge tokens to Terra (e.g. wBTC.atom via Eureka IBC route).

Polytone.label: Polytone
Polytone.description: Cross-chain messaging protocol built by the DAODAO team. Polytone Notes allow Terra-side DAOs to send execute messages to addresses on other Cosmos chains via Polytone Listeners.

_meta.description: Defines valid categories + subtypes for the catalog. Edit this to add new categories or subtypes — both the cron and the viewer page respect this file.

amplp_tokens.description: Eris vault tokens that wrap an LP position

validators.description: Reserved — not populated yet. Future use for terravaloper... addresses.

protocols.description: Cross-cutting tag — orthogonal to category. A protocol owns/operates a contract or token.

flags.description: Cross-cutting status flags. Any category can carry any flag.
